title: Outlive: Science & Art of Longevity
teaser: Are we training for the wrong metrics in our current longevity regimens?

title: healthspan
teaser: The period of life spent free from chronic disease, disability, and functional decline.

title: metabolic syndrome
teaser: A cluster of metabolic dysregulations (insulin resistance, high blood pressure, abdominal obesity) that elevate cardiovascular disease risk.

title: cardiorespiratory fitness
teaser: The capacity of the respiratory and circulatory systems to supply oxygen to working muscles during sustained exertion (often measured via VO2 max).

title: GRADE
teaser: Grading of Recommendations, Assessment, Development, and Evaluation; a standardized framework for rating the quality of scientific evidence from High to Very Low.

title: Evidence Grade
teaser: A standardized assessment based on the GRADE framework to rate the quality of research supporting an entry, ranging from High to Very Low.

title: Porphyromonas gingivalis
teaser: A keystone bacterial pathogen in chronic periodontitis, linked to systemic inflammation and neurodegeneration.

title: gingipains
teaser: A group of toxic protease enzymes secreted by Porphyromonas gingivalis, found in postmortem Alzheimer's brains.

title: atuzaginstat
teaser: An experimental small-molecule inhibitor of Porphyromonas gingivalis gingipains, tested for Alzheimer's treatment.

title: xenohormesis
teaser: The biological hypothesis that organisms have evolved to respond to stress-induced chemical signals in plants.

title: phytochemicals
teaser: Biologically active compounds produced by plants, often acting as molecular defense and signaling keys.

title: sulforaphane
teaser: An organosulfur compound found in cruciferous vegetables that potently activates the Nrf2 defense pathway.

title: EGCG
teaser: Epigallocatechin gallate; a major polyphenol in green tea that modulates AMPK signaling and metabolic pathways.

title: resveratrol
teaser: A natural polyphenol found in red grapes and berries that acts as an activator of the sirtuin pathway.

title: quercetin
teaser: A plant flavonoid and senolytic compound found in onions, apples, and berries.

title: fisetin
teaser: A dietary senolytic flavonoid shown to reduce senescent cell burden and extend healthspan in pre-clinical models.

title: curcumin
teaser: The primary bioactive diarylheptanoid in turmeric, known for modulating NF-kB inflammatory signaling pathways.

title: Nrf2
teaser: A key transcription factor that regulates the expression of antioxidant proteins protecting against oxidative damage.

title: SIRT1
teaser: Sirtuin 1; a NAD+-dependent deacetylase regulating chromatin structure, DNA repair, and cellular maintenance.

title: NF-kB
teaser: Nuclear factor kappa-light-chain-enhancer of activated B cells; a protein complex controlling cytokine production.

title: senolytics
teaser: Agents or compounds designed to selectively induce death in senescent cells to halt tissue degradation.

title: SAM cycle
teaser: S-adenosylmethionine cycle; a universal metabolic pathway providing methyl groups for epigenetic DNA modification.
